calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Steven Pollak, Esq. , As Counsel For Clarice Lacau
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICCI CORNELL's Motion To Disqualify Steven Pollak, Esq. As Counsel For Clarice Lacau IS Off calendar. A request for dismissal was filed on December 3, 2013. The matter is also moot because Ryan Dunn substituted for Steven Pollak as counsel on November 21, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICCI CORNELL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar per the request for dismissal filed on December 3, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Dec-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RICCI CORNELL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 5, 2013, to give the opposing party the chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
